posts.title: DHS Showed 9%. FOIA Showed Everyone.
posts.subtitle: Watch now | DHS publicized 335 names from 3,789 arrests. ICE's own FOIA data for the full operation shows 63% had no criminal record.

posts.title: I Had the Wrong Thread
posts.subtitle: My first draft joined the bonus and the power bill with the same money. Following the dollars killed the line and left the truer thread: leverage.

posts.title: Samsung's $400,000 Bonus, and the $4,000 One
posts.subtitle: Watch now | Inside one company, the AI windfall split 100 to 1. Outside it, the same boom lands on a power bill nobody voted on.

posts.title: I Almost Wrote ‘No Ruling’
posts.subtitle: I had a clean sentence saying the courts hadn’t ruled on age verification. They had ruled, a year earlier; they sided with the workaround the piece is about.

posts.title: The Bill of Rights Ends at the Contractor's Door
posts.subtitle: Surveillance, speech, biometrics, health data — four domains where the government's constitutional limits come with a vendor workaround.

posts.title: I Had the Wrong Number
posts.subtitle: The pass rate told me the proposal was uncontested. The proxy breakdown told me what the proposal was for.
